name: GPT-OSS 120B · vLLM · FP4 · 4×B200
explanation: OpenAI GPT-OSS 120B with FP4 quantization optimized for NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs. Based on InferenceMAX benchmarks, this configuration leverages Blackwell's advanced architecture with 4-way tensor parallelism, achieving superior performance compared to Hopper generation. Uses async scheduling, high concurrency support (512 sequences), and aggressive memory utilization for maximum throughput on cutting-edge hardware.
